diagrams.title: Linear Queue Operations
diagrams.description: Shows how elements rear and removed from are added at front in a linear queue
elements: Rear pointer showing last element index
Arrows indicating enqueue at rear and dequeue from front
Demonstration of front deletion problem after multiple operations
diagrams.purpose: Understanding basic queue operations and their limitations

diagrams.title: Circular Queue Wraparound
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how circular queue wraps around using modulo arithmetic
elements: Front and rear pointers moving circularly
Visual comparison of linear vs circular space usage
diagrams.purpose: Understanding circular queue concept and its advantage over linear queue

diagrams.title: Queue Operations Step-by-Step
diagrams.description: Shows step-by-step queue operations from empty to full state
elements: After more operations showing wraparound in circular queue
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how front and rear pointers change during queue operations
